name: @string/ab_cond_jinxed_name
description: A bad omen clings to you. Spirit Orbs shatter on impact while this lasts.

name: @string/ab_cond_trainer_focus_name
description: You move and breathe as your beasts do. Capture chance is improved.

name: @string/ab_cond_trainer_tier_1_name
description: You hold the rank token for tier 1. Higher-tier Spirit Orbs become available to you at the Beast Center.
